title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.2, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, list, delete models via simple async/sync API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama: works in Node, Deno, Bun and browsers (via proxy).

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration: use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider inside LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style): markdown, code-highlight, RAG, multi-user, dark mode.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama: synchronous & async, fluent builder, supports streaming and embeddings.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama: simple DSL to chat, generate and manage local models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive TUI for Ollama written in Rust: chat, switch models, view logs offline.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-like VS-Code extension powered by Ollama: inline suggestions using CodeLlama.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for Ollama: GPU/CPU nodes, PVC, ingress, autoscaling.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration: OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator for RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama: async streaming, chat, embeddings, model management in C#.

title: ollama-gradio
summary: Drop-in Gradio chat component for Ollama: one-line replacement for OpenAI in Gradio demos.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Docker-compose stack with Ollama, Open-WebUI, NVIDIA runtime, persistent volumes, reverse proxy.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain: ingest PDFs, query with citations.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for Ollama: reproducible builds, CUDA support, systemd service.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate: strongly-typed client for chat, generate, pull, list, delete, embeddings.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package for Ollama: chat, generate, embeddings, model management.

title: ollama-vscode
summary: Lightweight VS Code extension: highlight code → right-click → explain/refactor with Ollama.

title: ollama-go
summary: Early community Go client for Ollama: simple API wrapper for generate and chat endpoints.
